global.description: The ad features a warm orange background with geometric shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting the security and simplicity of VaultRun.

elements.label: Solid orange background
elements.description: A vibrant solid orange background fills the entire canvas, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: A combination of geometric shapes, including an oval and a rectangle, in a lighter orange hue, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Small circles
elements.description: Two small circles in a lighter shade of orange, arranged in a visually appealing manner near the main shapes.

elements.label: Descriptive text
elements.description: Text in white font stating 'Secure & simple Built for peace of mind', prominently displayed in the center.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Book now' in bold white font, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: UGC label
elements.description: A small label at the top left corner with the text 'UGC' in a simple font, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'VaultRun' displayed prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.
elements.text_content: Secure & simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo of 'VaultRun' is stylized and positioned at the top, enhancing brand recognition.

elements.label: Secondary call to action
elements.description: A smaller button at the bottom with the text 'Book now', designed to attract attention.

elements.label: UGC indicator
elements.description: A small icon indicating user-generated content, placed at the top left corner.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern and minimalistic, VaultRun, Secure & simple.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, main subject in the center, and CTAs at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: VaultRun, Secure & simple Built for peace of mind, Book now, UGC
